title: feat: allowlist cemalgnlts for community models
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: New model maker in the hive
gist.blurb: Community member cemalgnlts just got the keys to the model garden. We can't wait to see what they build!
gist.summary: Added GitHub user cemalgnlts (ID 45357531) to the COMMUNITY_MODEL_ALLOWED_GITHUB_IDS allowlist.
gist.impact: cemalgnlts can now deploy and share custom community models through the pollinations.ai infrastructure.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee welcoming a new creator, handing them a glowing key or VIP pass in a lush digital garden where models grow like plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot handing a glowing golden key to a friendly chunky robot in a lush digital garden. Code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots around them. Soft pastel gradient background with warm lighting. Lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, Stardew Valley vibes, emotionally warm and welcoming.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot handing a glowing golden key to a friendly chunky robot in a lush digital garden.
